{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Abidan tools
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Abidan tools]] are one of two types of weapons on [[Cradle]] that can rival [[Markuth]]'s [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
